samples.title: Chocolate Cake With Frosting
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan
In a large bowl, mix together first 5 ingredients
In a small bowl, combine eggs, milk, oil and vanilla
Pour into dry ingredients and mix well smooth. Stir in boiling water
Pour into the greased and floured 9 x
Bake at 350 degrees for about 40 minutes
Cool 10 minutes then cool 10 minutes
Frost with whipped cream or Cool Whip
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake With Frosting

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water
- chocolate frosting

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees
2. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan
3. In a large bowl, mix together first 5 ingredients
4. In a small bowl, combine eggs, milk, oil and vanilla
5. Pour into dry ingredients and mix well smooth. Stir in boiling water
6. Pour into the greased and floured 9 x
7. Bake at 350 degrees for about 40 minutes
8. Cool 10 minutes then cool 10 minutes
9. Frost with whipped cream or Cool Whip

samples.title: Chocolate Cake With Frosting
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan
In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda and salt
Set a large, deep, deep bowl, combine eggs, milk, oil and vanilla
Mix until smooth Add in flour ingredients and beat until
Stir in boiling water
Spread batter evenly
Bake for 50 minutes 60 minutes
Serve warm

samples.title: Chocolate Cake With Frosting
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan
In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, cocoa powder and salt
In another large bowl combine the eggs, milk, vegetable oil and vanilla
Combine with ingredients with the flour
Add boiling water and mix
Bake at 350 degrees for 40-45 minutes
Cool 10 minutes
Turn out on cooling rack and frost with chocolate frosting

samples.title: Chocolate Cake With Frosting
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan
In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, cocoa powder, soda and salt
In a bowl, mix eggs, milk, oil and vanilla
Pour over dry ingredients. Beat until well blended
Pour into the prepared pan
Bake at 35-40 minutes
When done, cool completely, frost with chocolate frosting

samples.title: Chocolate Cake With Frosting
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan
In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking cocoa and salt, set
In a medium bowl whisk together the milk, oil and vanilla extract
Whisk into flour mixture
Stir in boiling water
Pour batter into greased pan with spatula
Bake for 350 degrees ( minutes)
Cool

samples.title: Chocolate Cake With Frosting
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan
In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt
In a small bowl, combine eggs, milk, oil and vanilla
Add to the dry ingredients, stirring to blend
Pour into prepared pan and spread evenly
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes 40 minutes
